---
title: "Anastasiia Merchanskaia"
output:
  html_document:
    css: styles.css
    includes:
      in_header: header.html
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

<nav class="navbar">
  <div class="nav-brand">AM</div>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="index.html" class="active">Home</a></li>
    <li><a href="about.html">About Me</a></li>
    <li><a href="projects.html">Projects</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero-content">
    <p class="hero-greeting">Hello, I'm</p>
    <h1 class="hero-name">Anastasiia<br>Merchanskaia</h1>
    <p class="hero-tagline">Researcher · Data Analyst · Storyteller</p>
    <div class="hero-cta">
      <a href="about.html" class="btn-primary">Learn More</a>
      <a href="projects.html" class="btn-secondary">View My Work</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-decoration">
    <div class="circle circle-1"></div>
    <div class="circle circle-2"></div>
    <div class="circle circle-3"></div>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="highlights">
  <div class="highlight-card">
    <div class="card-icon">📊</div>
    <h3>Data Analysis</h3>
    <p>Turning complex datasets into clear, actionable insights using R and Python.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="highlight-card">
    <div class="card-icon">🔬</div>
    <h3>Research</h3>
    <p>Rigorous academic and applied research with a focus on reproducibility.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="highlight-card">
    <div class="card-icon">📝</div>
    <h3>Communication</h3>
    <p>Translating technical findings into compelling narratives for diverse audiences.</p>
  </div>
</section>

<footer class="site-footer">
  <p>© 2026 Anastasiia Merchanskaia · Built with R Markdown</p>
  <div class="social-links">
    <a href="https://github.com/yourusername" target="_blank">GitHub</a>
    <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/yourprofile" target="_blank">LinkedIn</a>
  </div>
</footer>
